metadata.title: Explore Bumicerts — Verified Regenerative Impact Projects
metadata.description: Browse verified environmental impact certificates from nature stewards around the world. Filter by country, organization, and impact area.

structuredData.name: Explore Bumicerts
structuredData.description: Verified environmental impact certificates from nature stewards around the world.

hero.description: Browse projects from communities and organizations restoring ecosystems, strengthening livelihoods, and building a more resilient future.

filters.description: Filter projects by organization, country, or impact area

search.placeholder: Search projects by name, keyword, or location...

empty.title: No projects found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or filters to discover more regenerative impact projects.

explore.resultsFound: {count, plural, one {# project found} other {# projects found}}

metadata.title: Organizations — Bumicerts
metadata.description: Browse all nature steward organizations creating verified environmental impact on Bumicerts.

hero.description: Discover organizations leading environmental stewardship and community-driven change.

empty.title: No organizations found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or filters.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We were unable to load the organizations. Please try refreshing the page.

metadata.title: Leaderboard — Bumicerts
metadata.description: See the top donors making an impact on Bumicerts. Our Impact Champions are ranked by their total funding contributions.

hero.description: Celebrating the generous contributors driving regenerative change for communities and the planet.

empty.title: No donations yet

chart.title: Donation Volume Over Time

onboarding.title: Onboarding required
onboarding.description: You are signed in, but your Bumicerts account is not set up yet. Complete onboarding to continue.

setupPrompt.title: Set up your organization
setupPrompt.description: Before you can upload content, you need to set up your organization profile. This only takes a few minutes.

wallet.signInDescription: Sign in to link your wallet and receive donations.

wallet.setupDescription: Link a wallet to receive USDC donations from supporters.
wallet.linkedSuccessDescription: It may take a moment for the indexer to process your attestation.
